summary: Tested PWS & ALPHA Tracker MVP - both backend (17/17 pytest passed) and frontend mobile UI flows on Expo web preview. All critical features working: JWT auth, dashboard, tasks (CRUD+comments+filters), attendance (batch+upsert+summary), hostel (gate-pass with RBAC + roll-call + dashboard), people/groups, notifications, RBAC restrictions.

minor.issue: JWT_SECRET read at import time via os.environ[...] - if missing the worker will crash; consider providing fallback or fail-fast validation message
allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False is OK for Bearer JWT, but explicit production origins recommended later

issues: Tab buttons have no testID (tab-home/tab-tasks/etc. expected per spec). Navigation works via label text but adding testID will harden tests.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: props.pointerEvents is deprecated, use style.pointerEvents (informational, RN/Web compat)

action_items: Optional: add testID to bottom tab items (tab-home/tab-attendance/tab-tasks/tab-hostel/tab-profile) for stable e2e testing
Optional: replace remaining View pointerEvents prop with style.pointerEvents to clear RN web deprecation warning
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 635 lines and combines all routers/models/seed. Acceptable for MVP but consider splitting into routers/ modules as it grows >700 lines.
TaskUpdate uses .dict() (deprecated in Pydantic v2) - prefer .model_dump(exclude_none=True).
/api/hostel/gate-pass list endpoint is not role-restricted; any logged-in user can list all passes. Consider restricting to warden/admin or filtering by requested_by for residents.
/api/users list returns all users to any authenticated caller (incl. students). Recommend restricting to admin/super_admin/warden.
seed_data() updates passwords for existing demo users to env-managed defaults on every startup - good idempotency.
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_pytest task and TEST_pytest gate-pass via API; left in DB (no destructive impact, prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://unified-track.preview.emergentagent.com. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py -v. Frontend testIDs verified: login-email/password/submit, quick-admin/teacher/coach/warden, stat-mytasks, filter-all/mine/high/pending, new-task, kind-student/player/staff, group-{name}, mark-{personId}-{present|absent|late|leave}, mark-all-present, save-attendance, logout-btn, notif-btn. Tabs lack testID; use page.get_by_text('Tasks'/'Attendance'/'Profile') instead.
